title: mespilus macracantha
intro: Mespilus macracantha, also known as the large-thorned medlar, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Mespilus macracantha include relief from digestive problems, fever reduction, and wound healing, among others. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
